# Test Fixtures

All pyramid output fixtures are generated by **libvips 8.14.1** (`libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2`
from Debian bookworm). Tests compare libviprs output against these vips-generated fixtures using
**decoded pixel comparison** — both PNGs are decoded to raw pixels and compared, so differences
in PNG encoding (compression, filters, chunk ordering) do not cause false failures.

## Regenerating fixtures

```bash
# Step 1: Extract source rasters from PDFs (uses libviprs)
cargo test --test gen_source_rasters -- --ignored

# Step 2: Generate all vips fixtures (uses Docker)
bash tools/gen_fixtures.sh
```

## Source PDFs

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `blueprint-portrait.pdf` | Scanned portrait blueprint, single embedded 3300x5024 Gray8 raster |
| `blueprint-mix.pdf` | Mixed vector+raster PDF, embedded 12738x220 RGB8 strip |
| `blueprint.pdf` | Landscape blueprint (used for CLI plan tests, no fixtures generated) |
| `password.pdf` | Password-protected PDF for error-handling tests |

## Extracted source rasters

Generated by `cargo test --test gen_source_rasters -- --ignored` using `libviprs::extract_page_image`.
These are the common inputs for both libviprs tests and `vips dzsave` fixture generation.

| File | Source | Dimensions | Format |
|---|---|---|---|
| `extracted_blueprint_portrait.png` | `blueprint-portrait.pdf` page 1 | 3300x5024 | Gray8 |
| `extracted_blueprint_mix.png` | `blueprint-mix.pdf` page 1 | 12738x220 | RGB8 |
| `rendered_blueprint_mix.png` | `blueprint-mix.pdf` page 1, PDFium 72 DPI | 4768x3370 | RGBA8 |
| `rendered_blueprint_portrait.png` | `blueprint-portrait.pdf` page 1, PDFium 72 DPI | 792x1224 | RGBA8 |

## DeepZoom fixtures

### `blueprint_portrait_expected/` + `blueprint_portrait_expected.dzi`

367 PNG tiles, 14 levels, DeepZoom layout (`{level}/{col}_{row}.png`).

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave extracted_blueprint_portrait.png blueprint_portrait_expected \
    --layout dz --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --suffix .png --strip &&
  mv blueprint_portrait_expected_files blueprint_portrait_expected
'
```

Equivalent libviprs settings: `Layout::DeepZoom`, `tile_size=256`, `overlap=0`, `TileFormat::Png`.

### `blueprint_mix_expected/` + `blueprint_mix_expected.dzi`

110 PNG tiles, 15 levels, DeepZoom layout.

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave extracted_blueprint_mix.png blueprint_mix_expected \
    --layout dz --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --suffix .png --strip &&
  mv blueprint_mix_expected_files blueprint_mix_expected
'
```

Equivalent libviprs settings: `Layout::DeepZoom`, `tile_size=256`, `overlap=0`, `TileFormat::Png`.

## Google Maps + centre fixtures

### `blueprint_portrait_google_centre/`

262 PNG tiles (non-blank only; vips omits blank tiles), 6 levels, Google layout with centre.

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave extracted_blueprint_portrait.png blueprint_portrait_google_centre \
    --layout google --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --centre --suffix .png --strip
'
```

Equivalent libviprs settings: `Layout::Google`, `tile_size=256`, `overlap=0`, `centre=true`, `TileFormat::Png`.

Note: vips omits tiles that are entirely background. libviprs emits all tiles. Tests compare only
the tiles that vips produced, and verify that tiles vips omitted are blank in libviprs output.

### `blueprint_mix_google_centre/`

210 PNG tiles (non-blank only), Google layout with centre.

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave extracted_blueprint_mix.png blueprint_mix_google_centre \
    --layout google --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --centre --suffix .png --strip
'
```

Equivalent libviprs settings: `Layout::Google`, `tile_size=256`, `overlap=0`, `centre=true`, `TileFormat::Png`.

## PDFium-rendered DeepZoom fixtures

Source rasters are rendered from PDFs via PDFium at 72 DPI, saved as PNGs, then fed to
`vips dzsave`. Tests load the same PNG fixture, generate a pyramid via libviprs, and compare
decoded pixels against the vips tiles at tolerance=0.

### `rendered_blueprint_mix.png`

Source raster: 4768x3370 RGBA8, rendered from `blueprint-mix.pdf` page 1 at 72 DPI via PDFium.

### `rendered_blueprint_portrait.png`

Source raster: 792x1224 RGBA8, rendered from `blueprint-portrait.pdf` page 1 at 72 DPI via PDFium.

### `blueprint_mix_rendered_expected/` + `blueprint_mix_rendered_expected.dzi`

373 PNG tiles, DeepZoom layout.

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave rendered_blueprint_mix.png blueprint_mix_rendered_expected \
    --layout dz --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --suffix .png --strip &&
  mv blueprint_mix_rendered_expected_files blueprint_mix_rendered_expected
'
```

### `blueprint_portrait_rendered_expected/` + `blueprint_portrait_rendered_expected.dzi`

37 PNG tiles, DeepZoom layout.

```bash
docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/data -w /data debian:bookworm-slim sh -c '
  apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libvips-tools=8.14.1-3+deb12u2 > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
  vips dzsave rendered_blueprint_portrait.png blueprint_portrait_rendered_expected \
    --layout dz --tile-size 256 --overlap 0 --suffix .png --strip &&
  mv blueprint_portrait_rendered_expected_files blueprint_portrait_rendered_expected
'
```

## Blank tile strategy fixtures

### `blank_tile_strategy/`

Generated by libviprs itself (not vips) via `cargo test --test gen_blank_tile_fixtures -- --ignored`.
These test the `BlankTileStrategy::Placeholder` feature which has no vips equivalent.

Input images (`blank_tile_strategy/inputs/`):
- `solid_white_128x128.png` — uniform white
- `gradient_128x128.png` — RGB gradient
- `half_white_128x128.png` — left half gradient, right half white

Expected output (`blank_tile_strategy/expected/`):
- `emit_solid_white/`, `emit_gradient/` — `BlankTileStrategy::Emit`, `TileFormat::Raw`
- `placeholder_solid_white/`, `placeholder_gradient/`, `placeholder_half_white/` — `BlankTileStrategy::Placeholder`, `TileFormat::Raw`

Settings: `Layout::DeepZoom`, `tile_size=64`, `overlap=0`, `TileFormat::Raw`.
